prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年清华大学在广东物理类最低录取位次分别为约88名、86名、96名、88名、118名。2021–2024年位次在86–96名之间窄幅波动，2025年明显后移至118名，较2024年后移30名，近3年累计后移约22名。2025年基准位次约118名，为近5年最低（位次数字最大）；清华大学在广东物理类招生计划：2021年61人、2022年59人、2023年59人、2024年64人、2025年67人、2026年72人。2026年较2025年扩招5人（+7.46%），延续近年扩招趋势，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年第1名（2021–2026年均第1），是中国最顶尖的高等学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应、校园安全及食堂宿舍等舆情，但清华大学作为顶尖学府，负面舆情对报考热度影响有限。抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极高，反映社会关注度持续旺盛。历史投档异常记录中仅2021年、2023年有低至中关注度信号，未见重大断档；清华大学在第五轮学科评估中拥有27个A+学科（如计算机科学与技术、临床医学、力学、化学、土木工程、建筑学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、电气工程、控制科学与工程、数学、物理学、法学、工商管理、管理科学与工程等），A-及以上学科数量远超10个，学科实力居全国之首，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热。广东省物理类考生数：2021年33.8万→2022年39.9万→2023年41.0万→2024年45.1万→2025年44.0万→2026年45.6万，2026年较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.59%），竞争加剧。；清华大学位于北京（非本省），在广东招生占比约3–5%（2025年广东省招生约114人，占全国总招生约3.2%），属跨省招生。广东考生对北京高校无明显地域偏好偏差。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移30名的趋势、2026年扩招7.46%的缓解作用、广东省物理类考生增加3.59%的竞争加剧、以及清华大学顶尖声誉的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准118名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约128名，区间113–143名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间113–143名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（≤113名）可重点冲刺计算机类、临床医学（协和）等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（≥143名）应以三档专业为主，争取进入清华大学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Guangdong Physics Category were approximately 88, 86, 96, 88, and 118 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 86 and 96, but in 2025, they significantly dropped to 118, a decrease of 30 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative drop of about 22 places over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 118, the lowest in the past five years (largest ranking number). Tsinghua University's enrollment plan in Guangdong Physics Category: 2021: 61, 2022: 59, 2023: 59, 2024: 64, 2025: 67, 2026: 72. In 2026, there is an expansion of 5 students (+7.46%) compared to 2025, continuing the recent trend of expansion, which has a limited mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking first in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many consecutive years (2021–2026 all first), making it the top higher education institution in China, with strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses, campus safety, and dormitory canteen public opinion, but as a top university, negative public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks second overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting sustained social attention. Historical admission anomaly records show only low to medium attention signals in 2021 and 2023, with no major gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tsinghua has 27 A+ disciplines (such as Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Mechanics, Chemistry, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Law, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, etc.), with the number of A- and above disciplines far exceeding 10, ranking first in the country in disciplinary strength, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable and hot popularity. Number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong: 2021: 338,000 → 2022: 399,000 → 2023: 410,000 → 2024: 451,000 → 2025: 440,000 → 2026: 456,000, with an increase of about 15,800 candidates (+3.59%) in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with an enrollment ratio in Guangdong of about 3–5% (in 2025, about 114 students enrolled in Guangdong, accounting for about 3.2% of total national enrollment), making it cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong candidates have no significant regional preference bias towards Beijing universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop of 30 places in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 7.46% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensification of competition due to a 3.59% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, and the sustained appeal of Tsinghua's top reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 baseline of 118. The predicted minimum ranking is about 128, with a range of 113–143.

- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Automation

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)

- Science Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Dushi College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 113–143, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤113), focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors like Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (PUMC); if the ranking is close to the upper limit (≥143), prioritize Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Tsinghua University.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年清华大学在广东历史类最低录取位次分别为约20名、13名、2023年无数据、20名、13名。位次在13–20名之间波动，2025年基准位次约13名，为近5年最优（位次数字最小）。近3年（2022、2024、2025）位次分别为13、20、13，波动幅度约7名；清华大学在广东历史类招生计划：2021年3人、2022年3人、2024年4人、2025年4人、2026年4人。2026年与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年第1名，是中国最顶尖的高等学府；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，但清华大学作为顶尖学府，负面舆情对报考热度影响有限。抖音热度总排名第2（高热），社会关注度极高。历史投档异常记录中未见重大断档信号；清华大学在第五轮学科评估中拥有27个A+学科，其中与文科相关的有法学A+、工商管理A+、马克思主义理论A+、社会学A-、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-、理论经济学A-等，文科类学科实力同样顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度推荐偏热，经济金融类专业分化观望。广东省历史类考生数：2021年26.9万→2022年27.2万→2023年29.0万→2024年26.9万→2025年29.2万→2026年32.6万，2026年较2025年增加约3.4万人（+11.64%），竞争明显加剧。；清华大学位于北京（非本省），在广东历史类招生仅4人，属极小规模跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次在13–20名之间窄幅波动、2026年招生计划持平、广东省历史类考生增加11.64%但清华大学历史类仅招4人（位次已在极高水平），预计2026年最低录取位次维持2025年水平。预测最低位次约10名，区间8–12名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Guangdong's History Category were approximately 20th, 13th, no data for 2023, 20th, and 13th respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 13th and 20th, with the 2025 baseline ranking at about 13th, the best in the past 5 years (smallest ranking number). In the recent 3 years (2022, 2024, 2025), rankings were 13th, 20th, and 13th, with a fluctuation range of about 7 places. Tsinghua University's enrollment plan in Guangdong's History Category: 3 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 4 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 4 in 2026. 2026 remains the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 1st in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many consecutive years, making it the top higher education institution in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but as a top university, negative public opinion has limited impact on application popularity. Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high social attention. No major discontinuities in historical admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tsinghua University has 27 A+ disciplines, including A+ in Law, Business Administration, and Marxist Theory, A- in Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, and Theoretical Economics, etc., demonstrating top-tier strength in humanities as well.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended as hot, while economics and finance majors are in a wait-and-see state. Number of History Category examinees in Guangdong: 269,000 in 2021 → 272,000 in 2022 → 290,000 in 2023 → 269,000 in 2024 → 292,000 in 2025 → 326,000 in 2026. In 2026, there is an increase of about 34,000 people (+11.64%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with only 4 students enrolled in Guangdong's History Category, a very small-scale cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings between 13th and 20th, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the 11.64% increase in Guangdong History Category examinees, but Tsinghua University only enrolls 4 students in History Category (rankings already at a very high level), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will maintain the 2025 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10th, with a range of 8th to 12th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law Category (including Law, Law International Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management) (including Economics and Finance International Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3: None (Tsinghua University only enrolls the above 2 major directions in Guangdong's History Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8th to 12th, it is recommended to set Law Category as the first-tier sprint and Economics, Finance and Management as the second-tier stable choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (≤11th), you can safely enter Law Category; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (≥15th), careful evaluation is needed.
